{{CargoOrgan
|name=The Deadpan's Heart
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10948
|idx=142
|description=Emotionally retired since birth.
|skill=
|hp=1794
|def=149
|atk=169
|rush=134
|gene1=Restore 400 HP each round
|gene2=During exploration, Water DMG +120
|gene3=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +4%
|gene4=Water DMG +1%
|gene7=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +4% (Awakened)
|}}
